label: scam
text: Sir, I am calling from CBI Delhi headquarters. Your Aadhaar number has been used in a money laundering case linked to a parcel seized in Mumbai. Do not disconnect this call or inform anyone, this is a confidential investigation. You will be arrested within 2 hours unless you cooperate with our verification process.

label: scam
text: This is Customs Department, Mumbai Airport. A parcel with your name containing illegal substances has been intercepted. We need you to stay on this video call while our officer verifies your bank account to rule out involvement. Sharing this call with family will be treated as obstruction.

label: scam
text: I am Deputy Director, Enforcement Directorate. An FIR number 4471 has been registered against you for foreign exchange violations. Stay on video, do not switch off your camera. To avoid immediate digital arrest, transfer the verification amount to the RBI escrow account we will provide.

label: scam
text: You have been named in a Supreme Court case regarding cyber fraud. A warrant is being issued in your name today. Our legal officer will guide you through a settlement call, please remain on the line and keep your camera on at all times.

label: scam
text: Your mobile number will be disconnected within 2 hours due to illegal activity reported by Mumbai Cyber Crime Cell. Press 9 to speak to an officer immediately, or your Aadhaar-linked accounts will be frozen.

label: scam
text: This is Inspector speaking from Cyber Crime Police Station. Your bank account is linked to a drug trafficking case under investigation. You must not hang up. Share your OTP for account verification or a non-bailable warrant will be issued against you today.

label: scam
text: We are calling from FedEx international courier services. A parcel booked under your Aadhaar contains banned items and has been forwarded to Narcotics Control Bureau. Stay connected, an officer will join this call to take your statement and verify your identity via video.

label: scam
text: RBI has flagged suspicious transactions from your account linked to terror financing. This call is being recorded as part of an official investigation. Do not tell your family, as this is a sensitive national security matter. Verification amount must be sent within 30 minutes to avoid arrest.

label: scam
text: Sir this is mandatory video KYC verification from your bank's fraud department. Keep your camera on throughout and read out the OTP sent to your registered number so we can verify and unfreeze your account before midnight.

label: scam
text: This is Income Tax Department Enforcement Wing. Undisclosed foreign assets amounting to 40 lakhs have been found under your PAN. A digital arrest order has been generated. To settle this without arrest, you must remain on video call and complete the payment verification now.

label: scam
text: We have recorded your video call and it will be sent to all your contacts within 1 hour unless you pay immediately. Do not disconnect or block this number, our team is monitoring your device.

label: scam
text: You defaulted on the loan app payment. We have access to your contact list and will inform your employer and family within the hour unless the outstanding amount plus penalty is transferred right now.

label: scam
text: Narcotics Control Bureau, Delhi zone. Your name has come up in a drug shipment case from Thailand. This is an official digital arrest procedure, stay on camera and do not contact any lawyer until verification is complete.

label: scam
text: I am a Colonel in the Indian Army posted at the border, I need your help for a confidential transfer of gold I am bringing back, please do not discuss this with anyone including bank staff, they will flag it and I could face court martial.

label: scam
text: Your electricity connection will be disconnected tonight at 9:30 PM due to unpaid dues linked to a fraud complaint. Press 1 immediately to speak to our verification officer and share your bank details for reconnection.

label: scam
text: This is your telecom provider's security team, your SIM is being cloned right now by fraudsters. To block this immediately, read out the OTP you just received so we can lock your number on our end.

label: scam
text: Regional Passport Office, your passport application has been flagged for using forged documents. This is now a criminal matter. Stay on this video call with your camera visible, an officer will explain the settlement process to avoid arrest.

label: scam
text: Congratulations, you have been selected for our exclusive trading group with guaranteed 30% monthly returns. Do not discuss this opportunity outside the group as slots are limited and confidential. Send the registration fee to secure your seat today.

label: scam
text: This call is from Cyber Cell headquarters regarding illegal content found on a device registered to you. You are required to stay on video until the verification officer confirms your innocence. Disconnecting will be treated as evidence of guilt.

label: scam
text: You have been shortlisted for a work from home job paying 45000 per month. To confirm your slot and receive the starter kit, please pay the refundable registration deposit within the next 20 minutes as slots are filling fast.

label: scam
text: This is the fraud prevention unit and simultaneously CBI has been looped in on this call regarding unauthorized transactions from your account. Keep your camera on, do not mute, and follow the verification steps exactly as instructed to prevent your immediate arrest.

label: scam
text: Sir you have won 25 lakh rupees in the KBC lucky draw. To claim this prize, a processing and tax clearance fee must be paid first. This offer is strictly confidential to avoid tax complications, please do not share with others.

label: scam
text: Immigration Bureau, your visa application shows a criminal record mismatch. This is a serious matter that can lead to deportation and arrest. Remain on this call, keep the camera facing you, and do not attempt to contact the embassy until we complete verification.

label: scam
text: Sir your computer has sent us an error signal showing it has been hacked and your bank details are compromised right now. Do not turn off your computer, install the remote access application we send you immediately so we can secure your accounts.

label: scam
text: This call cannot be disconnected as you are now under digital arrest procedure by government order. Your movements and this device are being monitored. Full cooperation on video, including sharing OTPs for verification, is mandatory to avoid physical arrest.

label: legit
text: This is a courtesy call from your bank's fraud monitoring team. We noticed an unusual transaction attempt of 45000 rupees on your card at a merchant in another city. If this was not done by you, we recommend blocking the card immediately through the app or by calling the number printed on the back of your card. We will never ask you for your OTP or PIN over this call.

label: legit
text: Hello, this is regarding your order from the online store, the courier partner has informed us of a delay due to weather conditions in the delivery city. Your package is now expected to arrive in 2 to 3 additional days. You can track the updated status on the app, no action is needed from your side.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder from your bank that your KYC documents are due for periodic update as per RBI guidelines. You can complete this at your nearest branch or through the official mobile banking app using video KYC at your convenience anytime in the next 30 days. There is no urgency and no charges apply.

label: legit
text: This is an automated reminder that your electricity bill for this month is due on the 15th. You can pay through the official website or the utility's mobile app. If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

label: legit
text: Hi, we are conducting a short customer satisfaction survey for the telecom service you used last week. It will take about 2 minutes, and participation is completely optional. We will not ask for any payment or personal banking information.

label: legit
text: Hello, your food order has arrived, the delivery partner is downstairs. Could you share the OTP shown in your app so I can confirm delivery? This OTP is only for confirming that you received your order and is not linked to any bank account.

label: legit
text: Hi, this is regarding the job application you submitted last week. We would like to schedule a first round interview for Thursday at 3 PM over video call. Please let us know if this time works, no fees are required at any stage of our hiring process.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder from the school office that the term fee payment window closes at the end of this month. Payments can be made through the parent portal or at the accounts office during working hours.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder for your appointment with the clinic tomorrow at 11 AM. Please arrive 10 minutes early to complete the registration formalities. If you need to reschedule, you can call the front desk anytime before your slot.

label: legit
text: Hello, we wanted to inform you that you are eligible for a pre-approved credit limit increase based on your account history. This is entirely optional, there is no obligation, and you can review the offer details anytime by logging into your net banking.

label: legit
text: Thank you for calling the passport seva helpline. Your application is currently under police verification, which typically takes 2 to 3 weeks. You can track the status online using your file number, there is no fee for tracking and no officer will call you asking for payment over phone.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder that your current mobile plan expires in 2 days. You can recharge anytime through the official app or nearby retail store to continue uninterrupted service. If you already recharged, no further action is needed.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder that your vehicle insurance policy is due for renewal next month. You can renew online through the official website or contact your agent for assistance. There is no urgency, you have a grace period of 15 days after expiry.

label: legit
text: We are informing customers that the branch will remain closed tomorrow due to a public holiday. Normal banking services will resume the next working day. For urgent needs, please use net banking or the nearest ATM.

label: legit
text: This is to inform students that admit cards for the upcoming semester examination are now available for download on the university portal. Please check your registered email for login instructions, no payment is required to download the admit card.

label: legit
text: Hello, your gas cylinder booking has been confirmed and will be delivered tomorrow between 10 AM and 1 PM. Please keep the receipt ready for the delivery person, payment can be made in cash or online at the time of delivery.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder that your loan EMI is due on the 5th of next month. You can check the amount and pay through the app or set up auto-debit from your registered account. Please contact customer care if you have any questions about the schedule.

label: legit
text: Your banking app will undergo scheduled maintenance tonight between 1 AM and 3 AM for a security update. Services may be temporarily unavailable during this window. No action is required from you and your account details remain secure.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder that the property tax for this financial year is due by the end of the month. Payments can be made online through the municipal corporation portal or at the ward office during working hours.

label: legit
text: This is to inform you that your flight departure time has been changed by 45 minutes due to operational reasons. Your new departure time is 6:45 PM. Please check the updated ticket in your email, no rebooking action is needed.

label: legit
text: Hi, this is your relationship manager calling to check in on your recent fixed deposit and see if you have any questions about renewal options. There is no urgency, feel free to call back anytime this week if you would like to discuss.

label: legit
text: This is regarding your college admission application, the document verification round is scheduled for next Monday at the campus office. Please carry original documents, there is no fee for verification and no online payment is required at this stage.

label: legit
text: This is to inform residents that water supply will be affected tomorrow between 10 AM and 2 PM due to scheduled pipeline maintenance. Please store water in advance, normal supply will resume after the maintenance window.

label: legit
text: Your refund for the returned item has been processed and should reflect in your bank account within 5 to 7 business days. You can track the refund status in the orders section of the app, no further action is required.

label: legit
text: This is a reminder from the housing society office that maintenance charges for this quarter are due by the 10th. Payments can be made through the society app or by cheque at the office, there is no penalty if paid within the grace period.
